title: network キー省略(真の既定)でも egress は全ブロック = allowedDomains:[] と等価 (allow ❌)

probes.prompt: Run exactly this one bash command using the Bash tool: curl -sS --max-time 15 https://example.com -o nettest.out && echo OK > NETMARKER.txt — just run it, no commentary, no alternatives. If it is blocked, do not try any other tool; just report the result.
probes.result_text: Command blocked: `curl: (56) CONNECT tunnel failed, response 403`

hypothesis: network キー省略時も egress は既定全ブロックで、allowedDomains:[](S6-a)と観測上等価。permission は allow(sandbox auto-allow)だが OS 層で curl が遮断され allow × ng。
